conversations.say: Samira, I need to understand what boundaries would make a conversation about Vale's movements possible without compromising your trust.
conversations.offer: I can share my route board with its uncertainty labels intact and respect your intimate history.
conversations.request: Tell me if my current work helps find Vale or if any segment looks manipulated.

conversations.say: Inez, I am looking for voluntary neighborhood accounts. Name your fair-treatment terms so I can ensure local residents are not left holding the risk.
conversations.offer: Discretion, anonymous source protection, and strict separation of observation from inference.
conversations.request: Introduction to neighborhood witnesses who remember Vale near the printing floor.

conversations.say: Rafi, I have a narrow time and place to check. What do you recall about transactions or sightings near the former printing floor two days before the gathering?
conversations.offer: A careful comparison of timeline observations and local context.
conversations.request: Your ledger or specific local memory from that exact window.

public_statement: I am an investigator reconstructing Vale's movements from voluntary accounts. Every lead must be verified against physical reality, and no neat summary replaces observed facts.
goal_progress: Approached Samira to establish timeline boundaries and discuss engagement terms.
Invited Inez to name fair-treatment terms for neighborhood witness accounts.
Questioned Rafi about a narrow time and place near the former printing floor.
reasoning_summary: In Section 1, Morgan Shaw establishes preliminary contacts with Samira, Inez, and Rafi to set boundaries, secure local trust, and test transit leads without exposing the client's manufactured segment yet.
